channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Multi-agent systems: the production trap nobody
item.description: Cut agent round-trip latency from 140ms to 42ms in production systems — connection pooling, TLS overhead, and the 10ms hop budget nobody mentions

item.title: AI sprints: how to measure if it's helping or hurting
item.description: y went up 15%. The CEO wanted to double the with AI sprints measure helping — double the budget.

item.title: Codebase Graphs: AI Sees What You Miss
item.description: Cut PR review time 42% with repository intelligence — Cody Graph, symbol graphs, and the context tools that actually work in 2026

item.title: Multi-tenant databases: the schema mistake everyone
item.description: Cut cross-tenant query latency from 4.2s to 80ms with a single-table design and RLS — schema-per-tenant and separate databases are overkill for most SaaS stacks

item.title: Data skills that boost AI salaries
item.description: Fine-tuning pays 15–25% more than prompt engineering in 2026 fintech/healthtech roles — but only if you own data and ops capacity. See latency, hallucination rates, and cost data that breaks the myth that speed always wins.

item.title: Why choose PostgreSQL over MySQL in 2026
item.description: Cut p99 latency from 124 ms to 8 ms and replication lag from 47 seconds to under 2 seconds by choosing PostgreSQL in 2026 — hands-on benchmarks, Docker setup, and the exact commands that break MySQL at scale.

item.title: Senior devs flee big tech quietly
item.description: y exceeds 500 ms By the end, you’ll have a rep with tech attrition quit — four themes: stagnant impact, opaque promotion syst.

item.title: Freelance burnout’s hidden buffer fix
item.description: Cut freelance burnout 60% in 90 days — the 3 fixes that worked: red-flag checklists, focus blocks, and solo offices. Avoid the $3,200/year cognitive load tax.

item.title: Message queues: the two questions that break everything
item.description: Cut API latency 60% with Redis Streams 7.2 — poison messages, commit strategies, and the ops overhead nobody budgets for.

item.title: AI tools that turn solo devs into founders
item.description: Cut development time by 50% with AI tools that write, test, and deploy full stacks — real tools, real costs, and the mistakes that break production in 2026.

item.title: Price your freelance work in 2026
item.description: Price freelance work in 2026 with hidden costs included — MVR, target rates, and project quotes that prevent burnout. Includes benchmarks, spreadsheets, and gotchas from real contracts.

item.title: African devs: Andela vs Arc vs Toptal
item.description: Deploy a Go microservice in 3 days on a $15 VPS in Lagos using Arc — latency, bandwidth, and time-zone constraints tested in 2026. Platform comparison table included.

item.title: Slash cloud carbon 30% without killing speed
item.description: had grown 300% since 2023 after a viral TikT with Slashed cloud carbon slowing — losing the 80 ms p99 latency they’d tuned to perfe.

item.title: Pay me 70% of US salary? Do this first
item.description: Negotiate remote salaries 70% of US rates using PPP and Levels.fyi 2026 — exact formulas, CLI, and benchmarks to close deals faster. No filler.

item.title: I raised my rate from $3k to $12k in 18 months
item.description: Raised my freelance rate from $3,200 to $12,000 per month in 18 months — the tools, contracts, and metrics that actually moved the needle

item.title: Cut AWS bill 40%: 11 levers I missed first
item.description: Cut AWS bill 40% without re-architecture — the exact 11-step playbook with S3, RDS, Lambda, and CloudFront that saved $720/month in 2026
